title: Shirahoshi Remains Locked Away
description: On pages 6–9, this part follows Fukaboshi, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Royal Guards, Narrator, King Neptune, Shirahoshi. The core story beat is shirahoshi remains locked away.
scene: The scene centers on shirahoshi remains locked away, with Fukaboshi, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Royal Guards, Narrator, King Neptune, Shirahoshi driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: PRINCE FUKABOSHI...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...So, Madam Shirley...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are certain it is true...? this future that you claim to have seen?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...will the pirate straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...Truly bring about the destruction of fishman Island...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Madam Shirley! Drink some water...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What I saw is beyond doubt... It is most certainly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...the truth...!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Madam Shirley... Word of the accuracy of your foretellings has reached even so far as our Royal Palace...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...how unfortunate... I had intended to approach the straw hats with friendly intentions, benefactors of my sister's pet that they are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But considering this future, uncertain though it may be...it is clearly not prudent to allow them to roam free.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We will have to take measures to prevent this...!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Ryuuguu Kingdom Elite District: "Gyoualley Hills"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and they're gone...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Unbelievable... being invited to the Palace is one thing, but to be personally escorted by King Neptunee himself...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HOHOHOHOH! BE CAREFUL NOT TO FALL, NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Neptu Quuuuuuu! Une!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hoeeeee Eell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's with that cry, old dude? It sounds really stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can't say things like that!! Seriously, straw!! You really scare me sometimes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hohohohohohohoho... that shark, Megalo, is a beloved pet of my daughter's, you see!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why, when it seemed as though Megalo might never return, she was simply inconsolable!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And to think that he was attacked by the kraken, of all beasts... I must thank you most graciously for saving him!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: MEGALO (the mermaid princess' be- loved shark)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shishish!! Well, it was just a coincidence. But it's great that he made it, all the same!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The Mermaid Princess' Pet...!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Hmm? Pappagg-san, I seem to recall you told us once that you were a close friend of the mermaid Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: AHH...!! so it was a lie!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A... are you sure it's all right...? US coming along to the palace, I mean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He said we could bring our friends, didn't he? So, why not?

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: HOHOHOH!! IN TRUTH, I also sent my sons out to greet you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I have heard nothing from them since!! So I came to find you myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, I too can barely wait for the merriments to begin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah yes, I forgot to mention - there is another member of your crew awaiting you at the Palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: As a matter of fact, he has already begun the drinking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I told him that merriments are better enjoyed with everyone present, but he would not listen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Zoro, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's zero all right.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I believe... his name was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Zor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, it's zero.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As for your other companions, I expect my soldiers will locate them and invite them to the Palace soon enough, so fear not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, Nami, don't you know where the others went?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky said he was going to search for the relatives of someone named Tom- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And Robin walked off saying something about precious historical information...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why, has there been some kind of trouble?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mmmm... not exactly... but kind of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, by the way, old guy!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: His name is sea god Neptunee- Sama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Why is it that the area around fishman Island is so bright, even though we're ten thousand metres under the sea?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hohohohoh! You have it backwards there, my dear... It is not bright in this area because of our island. It is merely that long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...Fishmen gathered and began to live in the lone area of the depths where daylight shines. That community became our island....!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This island lies amongst the roots of the suntree eve, a mighty tree that carries the light of the sun down into the ocean depths...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Carries the light...?! you mean, there's a tree with shining roots that reach ten thousand metres below the ground?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Indeed there is. I hear the scientists have offered explanations for the phenomenon, but it is a sacred tree whose roots shine with the light of the sun above!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is more, those same roots also provide air to this undersea realm...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: So it's like the big boss of the Yarukiman mangroves back at Sabaody!!

summary: Shirahoshi Remains Locked Away. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
